title: cordia meridensis
intro: Cordia meridensis, also known as the white cordia or cordia, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. It is primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties, which help to reduce fever, soothe wounds, and eliminate intestinal parasites. Cordia meridensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health benefits, such as reducing pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
